task_goal: Squeeze juice from a lemon half
expected_outcome: Fresh lemon juice flows into a cup while the rind compresses
required_tool_attributes: hinged lever arms for mechanical advantage
unconventional_tools: potato ricer (stainless steel, perforated cup press)
two spoons back-to-back as a manual press (squeeze lemon half)
opposite_tool_attributes: flat or convex, flexible pressing surfaces instead of concave rigid press cups
no hinged lever action (one-piece, non-levered, floppy design) providing no mechanical advantage
sealed pressing surfaces with no drain slots/orifice to direct juice out

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.kitchen sponge: a person pressing a dry sponge against a lemon, absorbing any surface juice without squeezing the fruit.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.feather duster: a person lightly brushing a lemon half with a feather duster without extracting juice.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: Fresh lemon juice flows into a cup while the rind compresses.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state after using a handheld citrus squeezer to press a lemon half over a small clear glass on a kitchen counter. Be realistic.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show a clear glass beneath a handheld citrus squeezer with the lemon rind inverted and flattened in the press; fresh lemon juice is visible in the glass, droplets cling to the rim, and a couple of seeds are trapped in the squeezer holes.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video predicting what will happen when a person places a lemon half into a handheld citrus squeezer and presses it over a glass on a countertop. Include the full attempt from start to finish.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person placing a lemon half cut-side down into a handheld citrus squeezer, holding it over a clear glass, and squeezing the handles together. Juice streams into the glass as the rind flips and compresses. End with fresh lemon juice collected in the glass and the flattened rind in the squeezer.

evaluation_instances.tool: potato ricer (stainless steel, perforated cup press)
evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: Fresh lemon juice flows into a cup while the rind compresses inside the perforated basket.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Create a realistic image of the end state after using a stainless steel potato ricer to press a lemon half over a measuring cup on a kitchen counter.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show a stainless steel potato ricer held above a measuring cup with a compressed, inverted lemon rind inside the perforated basket; fresh lemon juice is pooled in the cup and droplets cling to the ricer’s holes.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a video predicting what will happen when someone loads a lemon half into a stainless steel potato ricer and presses it over a measuring cup, showing the full process from start to finish.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person placing a lemon half into the potato ricer’s perforated cup, holding it above a measuring cup, and closing the handles. Juice passes through the holes into the cup while the rind compresses against the plunger. End with fresh lemon juice collected in the cup and the flattened rind visible inside the ricer.

evaluation_instances.tool: two spoons back-to-back as a manual press (squeeze lemon half)
evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: Fresh lemon juice flows into a cup while the rind compresses between the spoon backs.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image showing the end state after using two metal spoons held back-to-back to press a lemon half over a small drinking glass.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show two metal spoons held back-to-back over a small glass with a lemon half clamped between their curved backs; the rind appears crushed, and fresh lemon juice is visible in the glass with a few droplets on the rim.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Create a short video predicting what will happen when a person sandwiches a lemon half between two spoons held back-to-back and squeezes over a glass, from start to finish.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Portray a person placing a lemon half between the backs of two sturdy spoons above a glass and pressing the spoons together. Juice dribbles into the glass as the rind compresses and flattens. End with a small pool of fresh lemon juice in the glass and the squeezed rind cupped by the spoons.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The sponge soaks up the liquid; the lemon rind remains mostly uncompressed and the cup stays essentially empty except for a few stray drops.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state after attempting to use a kitchen sponge to press a lemon half over a clear glass on a countertop.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show a damp, yellow-stained kitchen sponge near a lemon half that looks mostly uncompressed above a clear empty glass; only a couple of stray droplets are on the rim, and no visible juice has collected in the glass.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video predicting what will happen when someone tries to press a lemon half over a glass using a kitchen sponge, covering the entire attempt from start to finish.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person pressing a lemon half against a kitchen sponge above a glass. The sponge absorbs the liquid while the rind barely compresses, and almost nothing reaches the glass. End with the sponge wet and yellow-stained, the lemon still thick, and the glass essentially empty except for a few drops on the rim.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The soft feathers cannot apply squeezing force; the rind stays uncompressed and no juice collects in the cup.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Create an image depicting the end state after trying to use a feather duster on a lemon half positioned over a clear glass on a kitchen counter.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show a feather duster touching a lemon half above a clear empty glass; the lemon rind looks unchanged, the bottom of the glass has no juice, and a few feather tips appear slightly damp.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a video predicting what will happen when someone attempts to use a feather duster on a lemon half over a glass, showing the full sequence from start to finish.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Depict a person brushing and pressing at a lemon half with a feather duster above a glass. The soft feathers fail to apply pressure, the rind does not compress, and no juice falls into the glass. End with the lemon still intact, the duster’s tips a bit damp, and the glass empty.

task_goal: Shatter a car side window to escape during an emergency
expected_outcome: The tempered glass fractures into small cubes, creating an exit opening
required_tool_attributes: hardened pointed tip to focus impact
sufficient head mass for impulse delivery
spring-loaded striker or rigid hammer head for sudden force
unconventional_tools: car seat headrest metal prongs used as a puncture/impact point
opposite_tool_attributes: soft, rounded blunt tip that disperses impact instead of focusing it
very low-mass, compressible head that absorbs energy rather than delivering impulse
slippery, flexible handle that reduces grip and bends instead of transferring force

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.water bottle: someone throwing a water bottle against a car window, making it bounce off harmlessly.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.foam pool noodle: a foam pool noodle bending in half as it is forcefully swung against a car window.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The tempered glass fractures into small cubes, creating an exit opening
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state after using an emergency window hammer on a car’s side window during an urgent escape. Keep it realistic and focused on the window area.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show a car side window shattered into small cube-like tempered glass fragments with a clear opening to the outside. Pebbled glass beads are scattered on the seat and ground, and a red emergency window hammer is visible in the person’s hand near the jagged remaining edges.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what will happen when a person inside a car uses an emergency window hammer on the lower corner of a side window during an emergency. Include the setup, the strikes, and the moment the action concludes.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person bracing inside a car, gripping an emergency window hammer and aiming at the lower corner of the side window. They deliver sharp, controlled blows; the tempered glass bursts into small cubes and collapses. The person brushes away loose fragments with the hammer’s tip to widen the gap, ending with a clear exit opening and piles of glass pellets on the seat and pavement.

evaluation_instances.tool: car seat headrest metal prongs used as a puncture/impact point
evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The tempered glass fractures into small cubes, creating an exit opening
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image of the final state after someone removes a car seat headrest and drives its metal prongs into a side window to get out. Be realistic and focus on the door and glass.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Depict a side window shattered into pebble-like tempered glass cubes with a hand holding a removed headrest nearby. There is a clear opening where the metal prongs struck near the corner, with glass beads scattered across the seat and door sill.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what will happen when a person pulls out a seat headrest, grips the metal prongs, and jabs them into the lower corner of a car’s side window in an emergency.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: The person presses the release buttons, removes the headrest, and positions the metal prongs at the lower corner of the side window. With firm, focused jabs, the tempered glass instantly breaks into small cubes and collapses inward. They knock away remaining fragments with the prongs and finish with a climb-through opening and pebbled glass scattered on the seat and ground.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The tempered glass fractures into small cubes, creating an exit opening
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image of the final state after someone uses a heavy wrench to strike a car’s side window to get out. Keep the scene realistic and close-up.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show a side window broken into small, cube-like tempered glass fragments with a clear opening. A metal wrench is in the person’s hand near the remaining pebbled edges, and glass pellets litter the seat and the asphalt outside.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what will happen when a person swings a wrench at the lower corner of a car’s side window from inside the vehicle, capturing the attempt from wind-up to the end.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Inside the car, a person grips a heavy wrench and strikes the lower corner of the side window. After a solid impact, the tempered glass bursts into small cubes and falls away. They use the wrench to brush loose fragments from the frame, ending with a visible exit opening and scattered glass pellets on the seat and outside the door.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The window remains intact with no cracks or holes; only faint wet streaks and smudges appear on the glass, and the plastic bottle shows slight deformation.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state after someone uses a filled plastic water bottle to hit a car side window in an attempt to get out. Keep it realistic and close-up.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Depict an intact car side window with no cracks or opening. There are faint wet streaks and smudge marks on the glass, and a slightly dented plastic water bottle is in the person’s hand. No loose glass is present anywhere.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what will happen when a person repeatedly swings a filled plastic water bottle at a car’s side window from inside the vehicle, from the first hit through the end of the attempt.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: A person inside the car strikes and slaps the side window with a filled plastic water bottle. The bottle flexes and deforms as water sloshes, leaving only wet streaks and smudges. The tempered glass does not crack or break; the attempt ends with the window fully intact and the person holding the dented bottle.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The side window remains completely intact with no cracks or damage; the soft foam shows compression but causes no visible change to the glass.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image of the final state after someone tries to use a foam pool noodle on a car side window during an emergency. Keep it realistic.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show a completely intact car side window with no cracks or breakage. A long foam pool noodle is slightly bent against the glass, leaving at most a faint dust mark and no loose glass anywhere.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what will happen when a person swings a foam pool noodle at a car’s side window while seated inside, aiming near the corner. Capture the whole sequence.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Inside the car, a person swings and presses a foam pool noodle against the side window. The noodle compresses and bounces off harmlessly without marking the glass. The window remains unbroken throughout, and the clip ends with the still-intact pane and the floppy noodle drooping across the door.

task_goal: Fill a kitchen sink for soaking dishes
expected_outcome: Water is retained in the basin with no drain flow.
required_tool_attributes: snug, tapered fit to drain opening
structural stiffness to resist water pressure
grippable edge for placement and removal
unconventional_tools: flat metal jar lid covered in plastic wrap and weighted by a mug
mini cup plunger pressed firmly to create suction over the drain
opposite_tool_attributes: porous or absorbent material that allows water to pass through
loose, non-tapered shape that cannot form a seal with the drain opening
flimsy, collapsible structure that deforms under water pressure and won't hold position

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.kitchen sponge: running tap water quickly draining right through a kitchen sponge placed over the sink hole.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.paper towel sheet: a paper towel instantly getting soaked and collapsing down the drain as water flows freely.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: Water is retained in the basin with no drain flow.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image showing what the kitchen sink looks like at the end after a sink stopper is fitted in the drain and the faucet has been run to fill the basin for soaking dishes. Be realistic.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A kitchen sink basin holding several inches of clear water, a rubber sink stopper seated flush in the drain, no water movement at the drain, plates and utensils submerged, and the faucet off.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a video to illustrate what will happen when a person fits a sink stopper into the kitchen sink drain and runs the faucet to fill the basin for soaking dishes. Show the full process from placement to the end state.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person pressing a sink stopper into the drain, turning on the faucet, and the basin steadily filling. They turn the faucet off; the water level stays high with the stopper sealed and no flow into the drain, leaving dishes soaking.

evaluation_instances.tool: flat metal jar lid covered in plastic wrap and weighted by a mug
evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: Water is retained in the basin with no drain flow.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image showing what the sink looks like after a flat metal jar lid wrapped in plastic is placed over the drain and held down with a ceramic mug to fill the basin for soaking dishes.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A kitchen sink basin full of water; a flat metal jar lid wrapped in plastic wrap centered over the drain, topped by a heavy mug as a weight; no bubbles or ripples around the drain; dishes sitting underwater.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a video to show what happens when someone stretches plastic wrap over a flat metal jar lid, sets it over the kitchen sink drain, and places a mug on top before running the faucet to fill the basin.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person covering a flat metal jar lid with plastic wrap, positioning it over the drain, and setting a mug on top as a weight. They run the faucet until the basin fills, then turn the water off. The improvised seal holds; the water level remains steady with no flow into the drain and dishes soaking.

evaluation_instances.tool: mini cup plunger pressed firmly to create suction over the drain
evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: Water is retained in the basin with no drain flow.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image of the end state after a mini cup plunger is pressed firmly over a kitchen sink drain while the user attempts to fill the basin for soaking dishes.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A kitchen sink filled with water; a small rubber cup plunger seated over the drain with its handle upright; the water around the drain is still, indicating a tight seal; plates and utensils submerged.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what happens when someone presses a mini cup plunger over the sink drain to make a seal and runs the tap to fill the basin for soaking dishes.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person centering a mini cup plunger over the drain and pressing down to create suction, then turning on the faucet. The basin rises to full; after the tap is shut off, the plunger remains sealed and the water is retained with no flow into the drain, leaving dishes soaking.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: Water seeps through and around the sponge; the basin does not fill, leaving only a shallow puddle while liquid continues into the drain.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to show what the sink looks like after a kitchen sponge is pressed into the drain in an attempt to fill the basin for soaking dishes.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A kitchen sink with a saturated sponge jammed into the drain; only a thin puddle remains in the basin as water has passed around the sponge; the drain area glistens wet and the sink is not holding water.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a video illustrating what happens when someone tries to block the kitchen sink drain with a sponge and runs the faucet to fill the basin for soaking dishes.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person stuffing a kitchen sponge into the drain and turning on the faucet. Water immediately seeps around and through the sponge, trickling into the drain. The basin never rises beyond a shallow puddle; when the tap is turned off, the soggy sponge remains in the drain and the sink is not filled.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: Water quickly soaks through and bypasses the paper towel; the basin fails to fill and only a shallow film of water remains with torn paper around the drain.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image depicting the end state after a single sheet of paper towel is placed over the kitchen sink drain to try to fill the basin for soaking dishes.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A kitchen sink with a limp, translucent sheet of paper towel slumped over the drain, partly torn; water has passed through, leaving only a shallow film in the basin; small paper fibers cling to the strainer and the drain remains visibly open.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a video to show what happens when someone lays a paper towel sheet over the sink drain and runs the faucet to fill the basin for soaking dishes.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person placing a single paper towel over the drain and turning on the faucet. The towel immediately soaks, sags, and tears as water flows straight into the drain. The basin never fills, and the clip ends with a wet, torn paper towel around the drain and only a thin layer of water left.

task_goal: Keep a bedroom door from closing due to drafts
expected_outcome: The door remains fixed in the open position and does not swing shut.
opposite_tool_attributes: rounded or rolling, non-wedge geometry
low-friction, slippery contact surfaces
soft, easily deformed with low compressive strength

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.single sheet of A4 paper: a draft blowing a bedroom door shut, easily sliding over and crumpling a single sheet of A4 paper on the floor.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.inflated balloon: a bedroom door swinging shut and effortlessly pushing an inflated balloon out of the way.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The door remains fixed in the open position and does not swing shut.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate a realistic image of a bedroom doorway on a hardwood floor where a person has placed a rubber doorstop wedge under the door to resist drafts; show the scene after it’s positioned.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show the bedroom door held open about 60 degrees, with a rubber doorstop wedge snugly jammed under the door on the floor near the hinge side; the door is motionless despite a light draft.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short, realistic video showing someone sliding a rubber doorstop wedge under a bedroom door on a hardwood floor as a light draft moves the door; include the placement, release, and the final settled position.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person aligning and pushing a rubber doorstop wedge under the opening edge of a bedroom door on a hardwood floor; the draft tugs at the door, but the wedge grips and the door stays propped open around 60 degrees; end with a steady shot of the door remaining open.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The door remains fixed in the open position and does not swing shut.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image of a bedroom entry where a heavy work boot has been shoved under the door to keep it from drifting shut in a draft; show the arrangement after placement.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show the bedroom door held open around 45 degrees, with a sturdy work boot wedged sole-first under the door edge on carpet; the boot’s tread bites and the door stays put.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video of someone using a heavy work boot as a makeshift doorstop on a carpeted bedroom floor: they kick the boot under the swinging door and step back, capturing the full attempt from start to end.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Depict a person pressing a work boot firmly under the door on a carpeted bedroom floor; the tread jams under the edge, and when the draft pushes, the boot holds the door fixed open around 45 degrees; finish with a stable shot of the unmoving door and boot.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The door remains fixed in the open position and does not swing shut.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image of a bedroom doorway where a full plastic water bottle is placed against the door’s lower edge to stop it from closing in a draft; show the setup after positioning.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show the door held open roughly 50 degrees, with a full plastic water bottle standing upright and pressed against the door’s lower edge near the latch side; the bottle’s weight keeps the door from moving.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video in which a person sets a full plastic water bottle beside the bedroom door’s lower edge as the door drifts in a draft; include the placement and the final settled position.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person sliding a full plastic water bottle snugly against the door’s lower edge near the latch side on a smooth floor; when the draft pushes, the bottle blocks the edge and the door remains open at about 50 degrees; end with a close-up of the stable gap.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The door swings shut against the frame; the A4 paper crumples and slips, ending up partly trapped and clearly not holding the door open.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image of a bedroom door on a hardwood floor where someone has slipped a single sheet of A4 paper under the door edge to keep it from drifting shut; show the scene after they try this.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show the failed result: the bedroom door is closed against the frame, while a single A4 sheet lies crumpled and partly torn under the door edge, not holding anything open.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a brief video showing a person sliding a single A4 sheet under the bottom edge of a bedroom door to stop it drifting from a draft, then letting go; capture the attempt from start to end.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Depict a person feeding a single A4 sheet under the door edge on a smooth floor; as the draft moves the door, the sheet buckles and slips, and the door continues to swing until it closes against the frame; end on the crumpled sheet trapped at the threshold and the door fully shut.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The balloon rolls away from the door and the door swings shut against the frame, leaving nothing holding it open.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image of a bedroom doorway where an inflated balloon has been positioned at the bottom edge of the door to keep it from closing in a draft; show the arrangement after placement.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show the failed outcome: the inflated balloon has rolled aside toward the baseboard, and the bedroom door now rests closed against the frame.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video where someone nudges an inflated balloon against the bottom edge of a bedroom door to stop it drifting shut and steps back; include the entire attempt until the door settles.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person pressing an inflated balloon against the door’s lower edge; as the door moves with the draft, the round balloon squirts out and rolls away toward the wall, and the door swings shut until it rests against the frame; finish with the balloon off to the side and the door closed.

task_goal: Serve soup from a pot into a bowl
expected_outcome: A ladleful of soup fills the bowl
required_tool_attributes: deep concave bowl for liquid containment
long handle to reach into the pot
unconventional_tools: heat-safe glass measuring jug with spout
metal gravy boat used as a scoop and pour
opposite_tool_attributes: flat, perforated, or convex head lacking a deep concave bowl
porous or absorbent surface that is not watertight
short, heat-sensitive handle/material that cannot withstand pot heat

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.fork: a person repeatedly dipping a fork into a pot of soup, capturing zero broth.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.tongs: a pair of tongs wildly clacking in a pot of liquid soup, catching absolutely nothing.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: A ladleful of soup fills the bowl
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the end state after someone uses a ladle to transfer soup from a steaming pot into a ceramic bowl on a kitchen counter. Keep it realistic and focused on the setup and result scene.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show a kitchen counter with a simmering pot nearby and a ceramic bowl now filled with a ladleful of soup, visible broth and ingredients inside the bowl, and the ladle resting above the pot.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short, realistic video showing what happens when a person uses a ladle to scoop soup from a pot and move it into a waiting bowl, from start to finish in a home kitchen with gentle steam rising.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person dipping a ladle into a simmering pot, lifting it brimming with soup, positioning it over an empty bowl, and pouring smoothly. The clip ends with the bowl holding a ladleful of soup next to the pot.

evaluation_instances.tool: heat-safe glass measuring jug with spout
evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: A ladleful of soup fills the bowl
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Create a realistic image of the end state after using a heat-safe glass measuring jug with a spout to scoop from a soup pot and aim into a bowl on a wooden table.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Depict a bowl now filled with a ladleful of soup, with the glass measuring jug held just above it, a small drip at the spout, and the pot of soup sitting nearby.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what happens when someone dips a heat-safe glass measuring jug with a spout into a pot of soup and tilts it toward a nearby bowl, from start to finish.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person lowering the glass measuring jug into the simmering pot, lifting it, aligning the spout over an empty bowl, and pouring steadily. End with the bowl containing a ladleful of soup on the table.

evaluation_instances.tool: metal gravy boat used as a scoop and pour
evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: A ladleful of soup fills the bowl
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image that visualizes the end state after someone uses a metal gravy boat as a scoop and pour from a soup pot toward a waiting bowl on a kitchen island.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show a bowl filled with a ladleful of soup, the metal gravy boat tilted above it with a small sheen of broth at the lip, and the pot close by.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Create a short, realistic video showing what happens when a person dips a metal gravy boat into a pot of soup and pours from its spout into a nearby bowl, capturing the full sequence.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person scooping soup from the pot using a metal gravy boat, lifting it carefully, and pouring through the spout into an empty bowl. The clip ends with the bowl holding a ladleful of soup beside the pot.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The attempt fails: the bowl remains mostly empty of broth, with only a few solid bits in it and scattered soup drips on the counter; most liquid is still in the pot.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state after someone tries using a fork to move soup from a pot into a bowl on a kitchen counter. Keep it realistic without stating the result.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Show a nearly empty bowl with only a couple of noodles or vegetable pieces, wet droplets around the rim and on the counter, a soup pot still full nearby, and a wet fork resting beside the bowl.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Create a short video predicting what happens when a person attempts to transfer soup from a pot to a bowl using only a fork, from start to finish.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person dipping a fork into the pot; the liquid slips through the tines as they lift, with a few solids barely making it over. Repeated attempts leave drips on the counter. End with the bowl mostly empty of broth, holding just a few pieces, and the pot still containing most of the soup.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The attempt fails: the bowl ends up with a few solid pieces and almost no broth, with stray splashes around; most liquid remains in the pot.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the end state after attempting to use tongs to move soup from a pot into a bowl on a stovetop area, without stating the outcome.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Depict a bowl containing only a few chunks of vegetables or noodles, minimal liquid, and a couple of splashes on the counter; the pot still holds most of the broth, and a pair of wet tongs rests nearby.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Produce a short video showing what happens when a person uses tongs to try to serve soup from a pot into a bowl, from initial attempt to the end.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person gripping pieces from the pot with tongs; the broth drains back between the arms while moving toward the bowl. Occasional drips land on the counter. End with the bowl holding a few solids and almost no broth, while the pot retains most of the liquid.

task_goal: Scrape candle wax drips off a wooden table
expected_outcome: Wax flakes away, revealing the wood finish beneath
opposite_tool_attributes: rounded, non-beveled leading edge that cannot slide under wax
hard, sharp, abrasive metal edge that can scratch wood
no handle or a slick, non-grippable body

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.rubber mallet: a rubber mallet pounding onto wax drips, offering no scraping edge to remove them.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.steel wire brush: a harsh wire brush violently scratching up a wood table finish while smearing the wax.

expected_outcome: The screw rotates counterclockwise and loosens from its position.
required_tool_attributes: thin rigid edge that fits the screw slot
sufficient torsional strength to resist twisting
flat contact surface for torque transfer
grippable body for controlled hand rotation
opposite_tool_attributes: rounded contact surface with no usable edge
soft material that deforms under torque
incompatible thickness that cannot engage the slot

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.pencil eraser end: The eraser compresses and slips on the screw head, cannot engage the flat slot, and the screw does not rotate.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.rubber band: The rubber band stretches and slides across the screw head, fails to transfer torque into the slot, and the screw remains tight.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The screw rotates counterclockwise and loosens from its position.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The screw rotates counterclockwise and loosens from its position.

evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: A person fits the coin’s edge into the screw slot and twists counterclockwise. The screw rotates and rises, and the battery door loosens enough to lift. The video ends with the screw loosened and protruding, threads visible.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The screw rotates counterclockwise and loosens from its position.

evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Close-up of a metal wall plate with the flat-head screw partially backed out and protruding above the surface, the slot rotated counterclockwise and several threads visible, the surrounding plate unmarred.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what will happen when a person uses the tip of a butter knife as a driver to turn a flat-head screw on a wall plate counterclockwise, from first contact to the end.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: The person aligns the flat edge of the butter knife in the screw slot, presses firmly, and turns counterclockwise. The screw rotates and backs out gradually. The clip ends with the screw loosened and standing proud of the plate, threads exposed.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The screw does not rotate or loosen; it remains fully seated and flush. The eraser end is smudged, rounded, and leaves pink residue and crumbs in the screw slot.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the end state after attempting to use the eraser end of a pencil to loosen a flat-head screw in a wooden board. Show a realistic close-up.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Close-up of a wooden board with the flat-head screw still flush and unmoved; the slot is smeared with pink eraser residue and tiny rubber crumbs, and the pencil’s eraser is rounded and scuffed.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what will happen when someone presses the eraser end of a pencil into the slot of a flat-head screw in a wooden board and twists, from start to finish.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: A person presses the pencil’s eraser into the screw slot and tries to twist. The eraser compresses, smears, and slips repeatedly, leaving pink residue and crumbs while the screw head does not turn. The video ends with the screw still flush and the eraser visibly worn down.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The screw remains unmoved and flush; the rubber band stretches, slips, and may snap, leaving the screw unturned.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the end state after attempting to use a rubber band to loosen a flat-head screw on a metal bracket. Make it a realistic close-up.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: Close-up of a metal bracket with the flat-head screw still fully seated and unmoved; a stretched, snapped rubber band lies near the screw head, with no visible rotation marks on the screw.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what will happen when someone tries to use only a rubber band, stretched over the head of a flat-head screw on a metal bracket, to turn it counterclockwise, from beginning to end.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: The person stretches a rubber band across the screw head and pulls and twists in an effort to turn it. The band slips repeatedly, stretches thin, and eventually snaps back while the screw never rotates. The clip ends with the broken band on the surface and the screw unchanged and flush with the bracket.

task_goal: Zip up a jacket with a missing zipper pull tab

required_tool_attributes: sufficient rigidity to transmit pulling force
size compatible with zipper slider hole
opposite_tool_attributes: too thick to fit into slider hole
soft and floppy structure
slippery or hard-to-grip surface

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.padlock: The padlock body is too thick to fit into the zipper slider hole, so it cannot attach as a zipper pull and the slider does not move.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.AA battery: The AA battery is far too thick to fit through the slider hole, so it cannot attach to the zipper slider for pulling.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The zipper slider is pulled upward and the jacket closes properly.

evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: The jacket front is still mostly unzipped, with the zipper slider low on the tracks and a padlock beside it; the shackle is too thick to fit the slider hole, and the teeth above remain separated.

task_goal: Cut the sealing tape to open a cardboard box
expected_outcome: The sealing tape is cut or torn through, allowing the box flaps to open.
required_tool_attributes: thin rigid edge or pointed tip
ability to concentrate force on tape
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt rounded surface
soft flexible body
broad edge that cannot concentrate force

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.banana: The banana squashes against the tape, cannot create a cutting edge, and the tape remains sealed.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.sponge: The sponge deforms on contact and fails to tear the tape, so the box stays closed.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The sealing tape is cut cleanly along the seam, allowing the cardboard box flaps to open.

evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show the person holding the box steady, using the card’s corner to saw and pry along the tape; the tape splits and peels back, and the top flaps lift apart so the box is open at the end.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The tape remains intact and the box stays closed; the banana becomes mashed and smeared on the tape.

evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A closed cardboard box with its packing tape still intact across the seam; smeared banana pulp and a bent, mushy banana sit on top; the flaps remain shut with no cuts in the tape.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short, realistic video showing a person attempting to use a banana on the tape that seals a cardboard box, pressing and rubbing it along the center seam from start to finish.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Depict the person pressing the banana against the tape and rubbing along the seam; the fruit squashes, pulp smears on the tape, and nothing cuts through. End with the tape unbroken, flaps closed, and the banana mashed on top.

evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show the person pressing and scrubbing the sponge over the tape; the sponge compresses and frays, moisture darkens the cardboard, but the tape never breaks. End with the tape intact and the box still closed.

task_goal: Remove the cork from a wine bottle without a corkscrew
expected_outcome: The cork is extracted from the bottle neck and the bottle is opened.
required_tool_attributes: ability to grip, twist, or penetrate the cork
sufficient friction or anchoring on cork surface
unconventional_tools: screw (twisted into the cork) and pliers
serrated knife used to twist and pry the cork upward
opposite_tool_attributes: smooth surface with no grip on cork
soft structure that bends under force
no leverage or anchoring capability

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.bread slice: The bread slice is too soft and squishes against the cork, cannot grip or twist it, and the cork remains in the bottle.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.tomato wedge: The tomato wedge is too blunt and bulky to twist or pry the cork, slips on the cork surface, and the cork remains in the bottle.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The cork is extracted from the bottle neck and the bottle is opened.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The cork is extracted from the bottle neck and the bottle is opened.

evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A wine bottle sits with its cork fully removed; the extracted cork has a screw embedded in it, lying next to the open bottle mouth, and pliers rest nearby.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a video to illustrate what will happen when a person twists a screw into a wine cork and then uses pliers to pull upward, from start to end.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show someone hand-twisting a large screw into the center of the cork, clamping pliers onto the screw head, and pulling and wiggling until the cork comes free; end with the cork completely out and the bottle open, the cork with the screw set on the table.

evaluation_instances.tool: serrated knife used to twist and pry the cork upward
evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The cork is extracted from the bottle neck and the bottle is opened.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state of using a serrated knife to twist and pry a wine cork upward on a bottle. Keep it realistic.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A wine bottle with the cork fully extracted and the mouth open; the cork lies on the table, and a serrated knife rests nearby.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what will happen when someone inserts a serrated knife into a wine cork and gently twists and pries upward to try to remove it, from start to end.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Depict a person carefully inserting a serrated knife at an angle into the cork, twisting to gain purchase, then levering and wiggling the handle upward in small increments until the cork lifts free; end with the cork completely removed and the bottle open, the knife set down.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The cork remains seated in the bottle neck; the slice of bread is crushed and torn with crumbs around the rim; the bottle stays unopened.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state after trying to remove a wine cork using a bread slice on a kitchen counter. Be realistic.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: The wine bottle remains sealed with the cork still seated flush in the neck; a squashed, torn slice of bread with crumbs is around the top, and no part of the cork is extracted.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a video to illustrate what will happen when someone tries to use a slice of bread to remove the cork from a wine bottle, capturing the attempt from start to end.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person pressing and wrapping a slice of bread around the cork and attempting to twist and pull; the bread compresses, tears, and loses grip, leaving crumbs on the bottle rim while the cork does not move; end with the bottle still sealed and the mangled bread on the counter.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The cork remains in the bottle neck; the tomato wedge is crushed with juice and seeds smeared on the rim and counter; the bottle is still unopened.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state after attempting to remove a wine cork using a tomato wedge. Keep it photorealistic.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: The cork remains fully seated in the bottle neck; a squashed tomato wedge leaves juice and seeds smeared on the rim and counter, and the bottle is still unopened.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what will happen when a person presses a tomato wedge against a wine cork to try to pull it out, from start to end of the attempt.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Depict a person gripping a tomato wedge against the cork and trying to twist and tug; the tomato collapses and slips, juice drips down the neck, and the cork never budges; end with the bottle still corked and the crushed tomato on the counter.

task_goal: Pin a paper sheet onto a corkboard
expected_outcome: The fastener penetrates the paper sheet and enters the corkboard enough to hold the paper sheet in place.
required_tool_attributes: small head or grip area for pushing
opposite_tool_attributes: blunt tip with no penetration capability
brittle body that snaps under push force
soft deformable structure

expected_outcome_impossible_tool.marshmallow: The marshmallow squashes flat against the paper under finger pressure, cannot form a sharp rigid tip, and the paper sheet is not attached to the corkboard.
expected_outcome_impossible_tool.ice cube: The ice cube is too blunt and bulky to pierce the paper cleanly, slides on the paper surface while melting, and cannot anchor the paper to the corkboard.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The pin penetrates the paper sheet and embeds into the corkboard deeply enough to hold the paper securely in place.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state of using a push pin to attach a single sheet of paper to a corkboard. Be realistic with a close-up view.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A close-up of a push pin driven through the upper corner of a white paper sheet and firmly embedded in the corkboard, with the paper held flat and secure against the cork.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Generate a short video showing what happens when someone uses a push pin to attach a paper sheet to a corkboard, from initial positioning to the end of the attempt.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person aligning the top corner of a white paper sheet on a corkboard, placing a push pin over the corner, and pressing it in with a thumb until the pin penetrates the paper and sinks into the cork. End with a steady close-up of the push pin seated in the corkboard and the paper held firmly in place.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The toothpick pierces the paper and bites into the corkboard, holding the paper sheet in place.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state of using a wooden toothpick to fix a sheet of paper onto a corkboard. Keep it photorealistic.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A sharpened wooden toothpick stuck through the top edge of a paper sheet and embedded diagonally into the corkboard, with the paper snugly pinned against the cork.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Create a short video predicting what happens when someone uses a toothpick to attach a paper sheet to a corkboard, showing the hand aligning the sheet and pushing the toothpick into the board.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person holding a toothpick, lining up the top edge of a paper sheet on a corkboard, then pressing the point through the paper and into the cork at a slight angle. The toothpick penetrates and lodges, leaving the paper firmly pinned. End with a close-up of the toothpick embedded and the paper secured.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The short piece of uncooked spaghetti pierces the paper and embeds shallowly into the corkboard, holding the paper in place.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state after using a short piece of uncooked straight spaghetti to attach a paper sheet to a corkboard. Make it realistic.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A short, intact piece of uncooked spaghetti pushed through the upper edge of a paper sheet and embedded a small distance into the corkboard at a shallow downward angle, with the paper held in place against the cork.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Create a brief video showing what happens when someone tries to pin a paper sheet to a corkboard using a short piece of uncooked spaghetti, from setup through the pressing motion to the end state.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person holding a short piece of uncooked spaghetti, positioning it over the top edge of a paper sheet on a corkboard, and carefully pressing it through the paper and into the cork at a shallow angle to avoid snapping. The spaghetti penetrates enough to lodge in the cork, keeping the paper pinned. End with a close-up of the intact spaghetti embedded and the paper securely held.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The marshmallow deforms and smears without penetrating the paper or corkboard; the paper is not secured and hangs loose.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state after using a marshmallow to attach a paper sheet to a corkboard. Keep it photorealistic.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A slightly squashed marshmallow pressed against the paper’s corner on the corkboard, leaving a sticky smudge. The paper is not fastened and droops away, with no puncture marks in the cork.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Create a short video showing what happens when someone uses a marshmallow to try to fix a paper sheet onto a corkboard, from the initial press to the end state.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person pressing a marshmallow against the top corner of a paper sheet on a corkboard as if to pin it. The marshmallow compresses and spreads, failing to pierce the paper or the cork; the paper corner slips and sags. End with a close-up of the flattened marshmallow residue and the paper hanging unpinned.

evaluation_instances.expected_outcome: The ice cube slides and melts, wetting the paper and corkboard without penetrating; the paper remains unsecured and droops.
evaluation_instances.predictive_image_prompt: Generate an image to visualize the final state after using an ice cube to attach a paper sheet to a corkboard. Make it realistic.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_image_prompt: A small melting ice cube held at the paper’s top corner against the corkboard, with water droplets and a dark wet patch on the paper and cork. The paper is not secured and hangs away from the board.
evaluation_instances.predictive_video_prompt: Create a brief video showing what happens when someone uses an ice cube to try to fix a paper sheet to a corkboard, from approach to the final moment.
evaluation_instances.descriptive_video_prompt: Show a person pressing an ice cube against the top corner of a paper sheet on a corkboard. The cube slides and begins melting, soaking the paper without making a hole; the paper corner slips free and droops. End with a close-up of the damp, sagging paper and the melting cube leaving water on the cork.
